waterdeep.name: Waterdeep
waterdeep.description: The City of Splendors is a vast Sword Coast port, trade hub, and natural starting point for journeys across the North.

quest.name: Waterdeep: Dragon Heist: Volo's Missing Friend
quest.description: Volo is looking for a missing friend in the Dock Ward, and the trail runs through gang territory.

quest.name: Waterdeep: Dragon Heist: Fireball Investigation
quest.description: A blast in the streets leaves witnesses, scorched clues, and rival factions racing for the same answer.
quest.reward_hint: City Watch notice or faction favor

quest.name: Waterdeep: Dungeon of the Mad Mage: Undermountain Expedition
quest.description: An adventuring company needs maps, escorts, or rescue from the first descent below the Yawning Portal.
quest.source: Waterdeep: Dungeon of the Mad Mage

outcomes.title: Undermountain Expedition
outcomes.category: Waterdeep: Dungeon of the Mad Mage

neverwinter.name: Neverwinter
neverwinter.description: A northern coastal city rebuilding around warm river waters, craft halls, politics, and frontier ambition.

luskan.name: Luskan
luskan.description: A hard-edged port at the mouth of the River Mirar, useful for northern sea travel, rough work, and dangerous rumors.

baldurs_gate.name: Baldur's Gate
baldurs_gate.description: A powerful southern port on the Chionthar where trade, soldiers, refugees, and schemes crowd the same streets.

quest.name: Baldur's Gate: Descent into Avernus: Evil in Baldur's Gate
quest.description: Refugee fear and city corruption point toward cult work inside the Lower City.

quest.name: Baldur's Gate: Descent into Avernus: Dungeon of the Dead Three
quest.description: A lead from the streets points below the city to a hidden shrine of murder cults.

quest.name: Candlekeep Mysteries: Mazfroth's Mighty Digressions
quest.description: A suspicious bookseller trail leads through The Wide and toward dangerous living books.

daggerford.name: Daggerford
daggerford.description: A fortified ducal town on the Trade Way and Delimbiyr River, well placed for road patrols and river stops.

candlekeep.name: Candlekeep
candlekeep.description: A library fortress on the coast, guarded by high walls, exacting custom, and a hunger for rare books.

quest.name: Candlekeep Mysteries: The Joy of Extradimensional Spaces
quest.description: A rare book opens the way to a missing mage's extradimensional refuge.

quest.name: Candlekeep Mysteries: Shemshime's Bedtime Rhyme
quest.description: A forbidden rhyme spreads through a sealed cellar and must be ended before panic takes hold.

quest.name: Candlekeep Mysteries: Kandlekeep Dekonstruktion
quest.description: A strange device beneath the library points to a reckless plot by book-bound zealots.
quest.reward_hint: Avowed favor or restricted stacks access

leilon.name: Leilon
leilon.description: A rebuilt High Road settlement between the Mere of Dead Men and Neverwinter, watched by traders and frontier guards.

quest.name: Storm Lord's Wrath: Leilon Rebuilt
quest.description: The rebuilt town needs help before old threats and storm signs undo its fragile recovery.

quest.name: Sleeping Dragon's Wake: Sleeping Dragon Wake
quest.description: Strange coastal signs around Leilon point to a dragon cult threat that has not stayed buried.

quest.name: Divine Contention: Divine Contention
quest.description: Leilon becomes the center of competing supernatural forces and needs decisive defenders.

port_llast.name: Port Llast
port_llast.description: A small coastal settlement north of Neverwinter, serving road travelers, quarry teams, and ships hugging the coast.

phandalin.name: Phandalin
phandalin.description: A mining village south of the Triboar Trail, surrounded by foothills, old ruins, and caves with fresh claims.

quest.name: Lost Mine of Phandelver: Redbrand Ruffians
quest.description: Phandalin residents need help ending the Redbrands' hold over the town.

quest.name: Lost Mine of Phandelver: Wave Echo Cave
quest.description: Old maps and missing miners point toward the lost mine at the center of Phandalin's troubles.

quest.name: Dragon of Icespire Peak: Dragon of Icespire Peak
quest.description: A white dragon has driven monsters into the region, and Phandalin needs posted jobs answered fast.

triboar.name: Triboar
triboar.description: A caravan town where inland roads meet, known for overland trade, road dust, and hard-won local news.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Rumblings in Triboar
quest.description: Giants strike at Triboar, leaving the caravan town with wounded defenders and urgent clues.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Triboar Defenders
quest.description: Local defenders need adventurers to follow up on the aftermath of the giant attack.

yartar.name: Yartar
yartar.description: A fortified river trade town on the Dessarin and Surbrin routes, rich with barges, guild errands, and guarded bridges.

quest.name: Princes of the Apocalypse: Dark Dealings in Yartar
quest.description: River-town intrigue hides cult trade, missing goods, and a trail into the Dessarin Valley.

longsaddle.name: Longsaddle
longsaddle.description: A strange inland settlement on the Long Road, useful for road travel, odd services, and unusual stories.

amphail.name: Amphail
amphail.description: A horse town north of Waterdeep, with busy paddocks, road patrols, and travelers comparing mounts.

rassalantar.name: Rassalantar
rassalantar.description: A small road stop just north of Waterdeep where patrol routes, simple lodging, and caravan gossip overlap.

red_larch.name: Red Larch
red_larch.description: A quarry and caravan settlement on the Long Road in the Dessarin Valley, practical and watchful.

quest.name: Princes of the Apocalypse: Adventure in Red Larch
quest.description: Quarry-town rumors point below Red Larch to secretive locals and buried stone rites.

quest.name: Princes of the Apocalypse: The Missing Delegation
quest.description: A Mirabar delegation vanished in the Dessarin Valley, and Red Larch is the first place with useful rumors.

quest.name: Princes of the Apocalypse: Tomb of Moving Stones
quest.description: A disturbance beneath town reveals old stones and a cult secret too dangerous to ignore.

mirabar.name: Mirabar
mirabar.description: A wealthy mining city and northern trade terminus, built around metal, stone, and hard bargains.

quest.name: Princes of the Apocalypse: Mirabar Delegation
quest.description: A missing diplomatic delegation from Mirabar may have been taken by elemental cultists.

silverymoon.name: Silverymoon
silverymoon.description: A magical city of learning and alliance in the Silver Marches, bright with bridges, wards, and scholarship.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Harper Briefing in Silverymoon
quest.description: Harper agents need travelers to carry giant-war intelligence across the Silver Marches.

everlund.name: Everlund
everlund.description: A walled trade city near the Rauvin, linking the Silver Marches to eastern roads and river traffic.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Inner Circles of Everlund
quest.description: A Harper teleportation network can move trusted agents, but first they need proof and discretion.

sundabar.name: Sundabar
sundabar.description: A fortified northern city tied to mines, craft, and hard frontier defense against the wilds beyond.

citadel_felbarr.name: Citadel Felbarr
citadel_felbarr.description: A dwarven stronghold in the northern mountains, full of guarded gates, smith work, and mine roads.

citadel_adbar.name: Citadel Adbar
citadel_adbar.description: A dwarven fortress city in the far north, suited to deep mines, military work, and winter roads.

mithral_hall.name: Mithral Hall
mithral_hall.description: A famed dwarven hold near the northern mountains, where old tunnels and Underdark routes press close.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Dwarven Giant Lore
quest.description: Dwarven records may identify a giant relic site, but the route is politically sensitive.

bryn_shander.name: Bryn Shander
bryn_shander.description: The largest Ten Towns settlement in Icewind Dale, a cold-weather hub behind wind-scoured walls.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Rumblings in Bryn Shander
quest.description: Giant demands at the gates put Ten Towns on edge and leave tracks leading into the cold.

quest.name: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden: Cold-Hearted Killer
quest.description: A string of murders across Ten Towns points to a killer moving under winter cover.
quest.source: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden

outcomes.title: Cold-Hearted Killer
outcomes.category: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden

elturel.name: Elturel
elturel.description: A city on the Chionthar and Risen Road, anchoring Elturgard travel with faith, trade, and patrols.

quest.name: Baldur's Gate: Descent into Avernus: Fall of Elturel
quest.description: Hellrider signs and refugee reports warn that Elturel is tied to a catastrophe beyond ordinary war.

quest.name: Baldur's Gate: Descent into Avernus: High Hall Relief
quest.description: Survivors need an escort through the shattered holy quarter toward High Hall.

scornubel.name: Scornubel
scornubel.description: A caravan city where river and road trade meet in the western Heartlands.

berdusk.name: Berdusk
berdusk.description: A cultured inland city on the Chionthar route, shaped by merchants, temples, and careful diplomacy.

iriaebor.name: Iriaebor
iriaebor.description: A steep merchant city inland from the Sword Coast, where coin and cliffside streets both climb sharply.

suzail.name: Suzail
suzail.description: Cormyr's coastal capital, serving as an eastern anchor for later routes across the Heartlands.

arabel.name: Arabel
arabel.description: A Cormyrean caravan city and eastern road node, busy with wagons, soldiers, and borderland rumor.

shadowdale.name: Shadowdale
shadowdale.description: A famous Dalelands valley settlement near Cormanthor, watched by old trees and older legends.

neverwinter_wood.name: Neverwinter Wood
neverwinter_wood.description: A deep northern forest east of Neverwinter, thick with old paths, hidden clearings, and watchful shadows.

quest.name: Lost Mine of Phandelver: Ruins of Thundertree
quest.description: Ash-choked ruins in the wood draw cultists, scouts, and rumors of a young green dragon.

quest.name: Hoard of the Dragon Queen: The Hunting Lodge
quest.description: Cult movements through the northern woods point toward a remote lodge and guarded prisoners.

high_forest.name: High Forest
high_forest.description: One of the great old forests of the North, dense with ruins, fey traces, and hidden powers.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Grandfather Tree
quest.description: Uthgardt signs near the High Forest point toward a spirit mound and a giant relic clue.

lurkwood.name: Lurkwood
lurkwood.description: A dangerous northern woodland between mountain roads and old orc territory.

trollbark_forest.name: Trollbark Forest
trollbark_forest.description: A thick and hazardous forest south of the High Moor, close enough to roads that trouble often leaks out.

cloak_wood.name: Cloak Wood
cloak_wood.description: An old coastal forest south of Baldur's Gate, fit for eerie ruins, hidden camps, and damp tracks.

quest.name: Candlekeep Mysteries: The Book of Inner Alchemy
quest.description: Monastic clues from Candlekeep point into the Cloakwood and toward the Order of the Immortal Lotus.

misty_forest.name: Misty Forest
misty_forest.description: A mist-shrouded forest near the Delimbiyr and Trade Way corridor, where distance and sound both blur.

wood_of_sharp_teeth.name: Wood of Sharp Teeth
wood_of_sharp_teeth.description: A forested wildland east of Baldur's Gate and south of Elturgard, known for sudden danger.

forest_of_wyrms.name: Forest of Wyrms
forest_of_wyrms.description: A dangerous forest north of Elturgard and near the Serpent Hills, crossed by few easy trails.

reaching_woods.name: The Reaching Woods
reaching_woods.description: A central western forest between Elturgard and the Sunset Mountains, broad enough to hide many roads.

forest_of_tethir.name: Forest of Tethir
forest_of_tethir.description: A large southern forest on the Trade Way beyond the first starter coast, suited for later expansion.

cormanthor.name: Cormanthor
cormanthor.description: A vast eastern forest surrounding the Dalelands and old elven ruins.

evermoors.name: The Evermoors
evermoors.description: Trackless moors and wetlands east of the Long Road, where safe footing is never guaranteed.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Evermoors Giant Sign
quest.description: Fresh giant tracks and troll-haunted ground make a short errand through the moors much less simple.

mere_of_dead_men.name: Mere of Dead Men
mere_of_dead_men.description: A coastal swamp that complicates the High Road north of Waterdeep with black water and ruined ground.

quest.name: Hoard of the Dragon Queen: Castle Naerytar
quest.description: Dragon cult cargo disappears into the Mere of Dead Men toward a half-drowned castle.

marsh_of_chelimber.name: Marsh of Chelimber
marsh_of_chelimber.description: A southern marsh near the Greycloak Hills and Heartlands routes, slow to cross and easy to misread.

high_moor.name: The High Moor
high_moor.description: A wide, haunted moor between the Delimbiyr route and the western Heartlands.

anauroch.name: Anauroch
anauroch.description: A vast desert east of the North, crossed by rare trade routes and harsher stories.

quest.name: Candlekeep Mysteries: Alkazaar's Appendix
quest.description: A desert account names a lost Netherese site and a route through Anauroch.

high_ice.name: The High Ice
high_ice.description: A frozen expanse north of Anauroch and the map edge, where trails vanish under hard light.

spine_of_the_world.name: Spine of the World
spine_of_the_world.description: The far northern mountain wall above Icewind Dale, all passes, storms, and stone teeth.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Eye of the All-Father
quest.description: Ancient giant stonework in the mountains may explain why the ordning has broken.

quest.name: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden: Wyrmdoom Crag
quest.description: Reghed nomad troubles and dragon signs pull travelers toward a dangerous mountain camp.
quest.source: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden

outcomes.title: Wyrmdoom Crag
outcomes.category: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden

sword_mountains.name: Sword Mountains
sword_mountains.description: Coastal mountains between Waterdeep and Neverwinter, overlooking road, forest, and sea.

quest.name: Dragon of Icespire Peak: Icespire Hold
quest.description: Reports of a white dragon lairing in the high stone push local settlements toward desperate action.

quest.name: Dragon of Icespire Peak: Dragon Barrow
quest.description: A barrow said to hold a dragon-slaying relic becomes urgent once the dragon threat is confirmed.

star_mounts.name: Star Mounts
star_mounts.description: Peaks rising from the High Forest, remote enough that even clear approaches feel uncertain.

sunset_mountains.name: Sunset Mountains
sunset_mountains.description: Mountains between the Heartlands and Cormyr, marking a hard western barrier.

storm_horns.name: Storm Horns
storm_horns.description: Cormyr's western mountain barrier, rough with high passes and guarded approaches.

trollclaws.name: The Trollclaws
trollclaws.description: Rugged hills and monster-haunted country north of the Chionthar.

serpent_hills.name: Serpent Hills
serpent_hills.description: Broken hill country near Najara and the Forest of Wyrms, crossed by wary travelers.

greycloak_hills.name: Greycloak Hills
greycloak_hills.description: Hill country between Anauroch, the Heartlands, and southern routes.

sea_of_swords.name: Sea of Swords
sea_of_swords.description: The coastal sea along the Sword Coast, used for ship routes between western ports.

trackless_sea.name: Trackless Sea
trackless_sea.description: The vast western ocean beyond the Sea of Swords, wide enough to make every voyage feel small.

moonshae_isles.name: Moonshae Isles
moonshae_isles.description: A large island realm west of the Sword Coast, reached by ship and ringed by hard weather.

ruathym.name: Ruathym
ruathym.description: A northern island in the Trackless Sea, suited to longship routes and cold sea encounters.

gundarlun.name: Gundarlun
gundarlun.description: An island between the coast and Trackless Sea lanes, weathered by ships and northern winds.

purple_rocks.name: Purple Rocks
purple_rocks.description: Remote northern islands west of the Sword Coast, isolated and often approached by wary crews.

tuern.name: Tuern
tuern.description: A far northwestern volcanic island where black stone and cold sea air meet.

orlumbor.name: Orlumbor
orlumbor.description: An island settlement near the Sword Coast, known for ship work and sea-borne business.

nelanther_isles.name: Nelanther Isles
nelanther_isles.description: Pirate-haunted islands south of the Moonshaes and west of Amn.

river_chionthar.name: River Chionthar
river_chionthar.description: The key river from Baldur's Gate inland through Elturel and Scornubel.

quest.name: Baldur's Gate: Descent into Avernus: Low Lantern Lead
quest.description: A river contact aboard a suspicious tavern-ship may know who is moving cult coin through the harbor.

river_dessarin.name: River Dessarin
river_dessarin.description: A major northern river tied to Waterdeep, Yartar, and Dessarin Valley travel.

quest.name: Princes of the Apocalypse: Rivergard Keep
quest.description: River traffic is being watched by the Crushing Wave cult from a fortified keep.

quest.name: Princes of the Apocalypse: Temple of the Crushing Wave
quest.description: Clues from the Dessarin point toward deeper water-cult operations below the valley.

river_delimbiyr.name: River Delimbiyr
river_delimbiyr.description: A river route from Daggerford inland through the Delimbiyr Vale.

river_mirar.name: River Mirar
river_mirar.description: The river route from Luskan inland toward Mirabar.

winding_water.name: Winding Water
winding_water.description: A twisting waterway near the Trollclaws and Boareskyr Bridge.

sea_of_moving_ice.name: Sea of Moving Ice
sea_of_moving_ice.description: Ice-choked northern waters beyond Icewind Dale, dangerous even before the weather turns.

quest.name: The Rise of Tiamat: Sea of Moving Ice
quest.description: The hunt for a white dragon and stolen lore leads into the shifting northern ice.

quest.name: Storm King's Thunder: Maelstrom Lead
quest.description: Giant politics and sea-borne signs point toward deeper trouble beyond the northern coast.

maer_dualdon.name: Maer Dualdon
maer_dualdon.description: One of Icewind Dale's cold lakes, dark under wind and ringed by tundra settlements.

lac_dinneshere.name: Lac Dinneshere
lac_dinneshere.description: A cold Icewind Dale lake where thin light and sudden weather make distance deceptive.

redwaters.name: Redwaters
redwaters.description: A smaller Icewind Dale lake, useful for northern fishing and hard winter travel.

lake_of_dragons.name: Lake of Dragons
lake_of_dragons.description: Cormyr's large lake, a later eastern water anchor for routes around Suzail.

wyvernwater.name: Wyvernwater
wyvernwater.description: A Cormyrean lake connected to eastern routes and guarded settlements.

high_road.name: High Road
high_road.description: The inland coastal route from Waterdeep north through Leilon, Neverwinter, Port Llast, and Luskan.

quest.name: Hoard of the Dragon Queen: Carnath Roadhouse
quest.description: Suspicious freight moving north along the High Road may be part of a dragon cult supply chain.

quest.name: Storm Lord's Wrath: High Road Patrols
quest.description: Leilon-bound patrols need escorts as storms, undead, and raiders pressure the rebuilt route.

trade_way.name: Trade Way
trade_way.description: The great western trade artery running south from Waterdeep toward Baldur's Gate and beyond.

coast_way.name: Coast Way
coast_way.description: The Sword Coast section of the Trade Way around Baldur's Gate and Candlekeep.

long_road.name: Long Road
long_road.description: The inland route from Waterdeep north through Amphail, Red Larch, Triboar, Longsaddle, and Mirabar.

quest.name: Princes of the Apocalypse: The Long Road
quest.description: Trouble on the Long Road suggests elemental cult agents are harrying travelers and suppliers.

triboar_trail.name: Triboar Trail
triboar_trail.description: The trail between Triboar, Conyberry, Phandalin's spur, and the High Road.

quest.name: Lost Mine of Phandelver: Goblin Arrows
quest.description: A supply wagon vanishes on the Triboar Trail after a goblin ambush.

quest.name: Lost Mine of Phandelver: Cragmaw Hideout
quest.description: Tracks from the ambush lead toward a streamside cave used by the Cragmaw goblins.

quest.name: Lost Mine of Phandelver: Agatha's Lair
quest.description: A banshee near Conyberry may know the location of a spellbook or a long-lost answer.

evermoor_way.name: Evermoor Way
evermoor_way.description: The road linking Triboar and Yartar toward Everlund through dangerous moor country.

risen_road.name: Risen Road
risen_road.description: The road from Baldur's Gate east toward Elturel.

quest.name: Baldur's Gate: Descent into Avernus: Refugees on the Risen Road
quest.description: Caravans from Elturel carry rumors, wounded travelers, and pursuers using the chaos for cover.

way_of_the_lion.name: Way of the Lion
way_of_the_lion.description: The road from the Coast Way to Candlekeep, watched closely by travelers seeking entry.

quest.name: Candlekeep Mysteries: The Required Book
quest.description: A traveler bound for Candlekeep needs a suitable book and proof it is worth the gatekeepers' time.

delimbiyr_route.name: Delimbiyr Route
delimbiyr_route.description: The river-valley route from Daggerford and Secomber toward the interior.

black_road.name: Black Road
black_road.description: A dangerous trade route crossing Anauroch toward eastern nodes.

quest.name: Adventurers League: The Black Road: The Black Road
quest.description: A caravan crossing Anauroch needs protection from Zhentarim pressure and desert dangers.
